arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer news: How many players do the Gunners want to sell next summer?
arts.sum: Arsenal are reportedly already planning for the next summer transfer window, with sporting director Edu placing three first-team player's names on the chopping block.

arts.ttl: Arsenal know Sterling's North London derby guarantee after 10 second approval
arts.sum: The forward, who has scored 123 Premier League goals, joined the Gunners on deadline day to bolster Arteta's options in attack. The north Londoners spent a large part of the summer transfer window interested in another attacker before looking likely to stick with the crop of options in the forward line.

arts.ttl: Arsenal 'suffered emphatic rejection' after enquiry over Bayern Munich star
arts.sum: Arsenal reportedly failed in their attempts to sign three players this summer before securing a last-minute deal for Raheem Sterling on transfer deadline day.

arts.ttl: Man Utd make two exciting transfers official as wait for Arsenal deal continues
arts.sum: Manchester United are continuing to welcome new players under their INEOS regime, despite the summer transfer window coming to a close more than a fortnight ago

arts.ttl: Arsenal forced to break 38-year North London Derby tradition after Premier League decision
arts.sum: The fixture will see Arsenal wear their away kit in the North London Derby, breaking nearly a four-decade-long tradition in the process. Mikel Arteta's side go into the game with seven points from their first three Premier League fixtures before the international break and will be looking to bounce back from the 1-1 draw with Brighton.

arts.ttl: Tottenham could offer €20 million to sign versatile attacker in January
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are reportedly keen on signing the AC Milan winger Noah Okafor. According to a report from Milan Live, Tottenham are keeping tabs on his development and they are willing to submit an offer of around €20 million in the coming months.
